response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) and current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators at re:cinq. His background spans high-scale systems (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), fintech (RIDE Capital with TDD/trunk-based development), and product work (Optilyz with AWS CDK), demonstrating both breadth and engineering rigor. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java production depth, and Vitest specifically, but his polyglot history and craftsmanship focus make these low-risk to close.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP framework experience at current role aligns with a key required skill
Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB experience plus AWS CDK and Docker/Kubernetes exposure
Strong craftsmanship signal: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms at Altom, ~2016-2018) rather than recent backend services
Heavy historical investment in DLang may suggest preference for less mainstream stacks than the team's primary
